meaning: 菩提达摩(印度僧人,中国佛教禅宗的始祖)
examples: Martial Arts: Bruce Lee, Jet Li, Bodhidharma, Ghost dog.
About one thousand years later, the twenty-eighth patriarch was Bodhidharma.
In China, Chan developed from Bodhidharma, who is said to have come from southern India and introduced Buddhism here since 520.
